---
title: "03: Clustering"
output:
  github_document:
    html_preview: false
---

## R Libraries

```{r libraries, results=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(svglite)
```

---

## Clustering

```{r clustering, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(2024)

data.combined <- readRDS("RDS/data_Integrated_21_umap.RDS")
Idents(data.combined) <- "sample_names"

data.combined <- FindNeighbors(data.combined, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:30)
data.combined <- FindClusters(data.combined, resolution = 0.8)

saveRDS(data.combined, "RDS/data_21_umap_26_clusters.RDS")
```

```{r load_clustered, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
data.combined <- readRDS("RDS/data_21_umap_26_clusters.RDS")
Idents(data.combined) <- "seurat_clusters"

DimPlot(data.combined, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE,
        raster = FALSE, label.size = 5) +
  ggtitle("Seurat Clusters")
```

---

## Cluster Markers (FindAllMarkers)

```{r find_markers,  message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
data.combined <- readRDS("RDS/data_21_umap_26_clusters.RDS")
DefaultAssay(data.combined) <- "RNA"
Idents(data.combined) <- "seurat_clusters"
data.combined <- JoinLayers(data.combined)

data.markers <- FindAllMarkers(
  data.combined,
  only.pos        = FALSE,
  min.pct         = 0.25,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25,
  test.use = "wilcox"
)

wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "all_clusters")
writeData(wb, "all_clusters", data.markers)

for (cl in unique(data.markers$cluster)) {
  addWorksheet(wb, paste0("cluster_", cl))
  writeData(wb, paste0("cluster_", cl), data.markers %>% filter(cluster == cl))
}

saveWorkbook(wb, "csvs/data_21_all_markers_seurat_clusters.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
```

---

## Cell-Type Annotations

```{r cluster_annotation, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
data.combined <- readRDS("RDS/data_21_umap_26_clusters.RDS")
Idents(data.combined) <- "seurat_clusters"

cluster_annotations <- c(
  "0"  = "T cells",          "1"  = "PC",
  "2"  = "T cells",          "3"  = "Stroma",
  "4"  = "PC",               "5"  = "Mast cells",
  "6"  = "Endothelial cells","7"  = "B cells",
  "8"  = "Myeloid",          "9"  = "Stroma",
  "10" = "T cells",          "11" = "Stroma",
  "12" = "Stroma",           "13" = "Glia",
  "14" = "Myeloid",          "15" = "Endothelial cells",
  "16" = "Epithelial cells", "17" = "Mixed",
  "18" = "Proliferating",    "19" = "Stroma",
  "20" = "Myeloid",          "21" = "Myeloid",
  "22" = "Epithelial cells", "23" = "PC",
  "24" = "Epithelial cells", "25" = "T cells"
)

data.combined$broad_label <- plyr::mapvalues(
  data.combined$seurat_clusters,
  from = names(cluster_annotations),
  to   = cluster_annotations
)

Idents(data.combined) <- data.combined$broad_label
DimPlot(data.combined, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE)

saveRDS(data.combined, "RDS/data_21_umap_26_clusters.RDS")
```

---


```{r colour_palette, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
colour_palette <- c(
  "T cells"          = "#1B9E77FF",
  "PC"               = "#D95F02FF",
  "Stroma"           = "#7570B3FF",
  "Mast cells"       = "#E7298AFF",
  "Endothelial cells"= "#66A61EFF",
  "B cells"          = "#E6AB02FF",
  "Myeloid"          = "#666666FF",
  "Glia"             = "#A6761DFF",
  "Epithelial cells" = "#E41A1CFF",
  "Mixed"            = "#377EB8FF",
  "Proliferating"    = "#984EA3FF"
)
```

```{r umap_annotated, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
d <- DimPlot(
  data.combined,
  reduction = "umap",
  label     = FALSE,
  pt.size   = 0.5,
  repel     = TRUE,
  raster    = FALSE,
  group.by  = "broad_label"
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colour_palette) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 15, size = 5), ncol = 1)) +
  ggtitle("Broad cell-type labels")

print(d)
```

```{r umap_condition, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Exclude follow-up sample from condition plot
plot.obj <- subset(data.combined, subset = condition != "EC2_FU")
plot.obj$condition <- factor(plot.obj$condition,
                             levels = c("NV", "CAR-T Control", "CAR-T Enterocolitis"))

umap_df  <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(plot.obj, reduction = "umap"))
colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP_1", "UMAP_2")
meta_df  <- plot.obj@meta.data %>% select(condition)
plot_df  <- bind_cols(umap_df, meta_df) %>% arrange(condition)

p_cond <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, color = condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "NV"                  = "grey",
    "CAR-T Control"       = "#F5C342",
    "CAR-T Enterocolitis" = alpha("#D4494E", 0.4)
  )) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3, alpha = 1))) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(color = "Condition", title = "UMAP by condition")

p_cond
```

```{r save_umap_svg, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggsave(
  filename = "figs/all_celltypes_umap_condition.svg",
  plot     = p_cond,
  device   = svglite,
  width    = 1600, height = 950, units = "px"
)
```

---

## Cell Counts and UMI Summary

```{r sample_summary, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
reads_per_sample <- data.combined@meta.data %>%
  group_by(sample_names) %>%
  summarise(
    total_cells        = n(),
    total_reads        = sum(nCount_RNA),
    mean_reads_per_cell = mean(nCount_RNA)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_reads_per_cell))

reads_per_sample
```
